why: Ensure only entries with valid metadata are included in the index

output.console: Validation results with valid/invalid entry counts and specific issues

success_handling.criteria: All parsed metadata entries pass schema validation with correct types and required fields

error_handling.criteria: One or more entries have metadata that fails schema validation
error_handling.action: Exclude invalid entries from index, log warning with details for each invalid entry

decisions.outcome: Proceed to build-index step with all entries
Exclude invalid entries, proceed to build-index step with valid entries only
